securetools: Security-Hardened Tool Definitions for securer

Source: R/securetools-package.R
securetools-package.Rd

Provides pre-built, security-hardened tool definitions for use with the securer package. Each tool factory returns a securer::securer_tool() object with built-in security constraints such as path validation, allow-lists, rate limiting, and parameterized queries.

See also

securer::securer_tool() for the underlying tool constructor.

Author

Maintainer: Ian Flores Siaca iflores.siaca@hey.com
